results.justification: Poetic source-domain page; no LLM mechanism.
Intervening on anchor token during decoding to control hallucination; same artefact (anchor token) different operation (intervention vs N-branch parallel).
Semantic anchor as constraint in ICL; same concept of anchor-grounded constraint though applied to in-context learning rather than decoding.
PASTA parallel decoding of semantically-independent chunks; same parallelism artefact but uses independence vs DOHRA's redundancy.
PPD guess-and-verify parallel prompt decoding with special tokens — parallelism artefact present.
Parallel token prediction at ICLR 2026; same parallelism artefact.
Multi-token prediction draft head — parallel-decode adjacent.
Learn2PD learnable parallel decoding adaptive filter — directly the parallelism artefact.
